calendar.matters:
Petition To Deternine Invalidity Fo Purported Trust Provision
Off Calendar Dec-01-2008 Off Calendar

Petition To Deternine Invalidity Fo Purported Trust Provision
Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Continued To Dec-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Noel Lawrence for Beverly Sass (Petitioner). Richard Collier for Carol Soto.

The parties agreed to participate in mediation. Mediation is to be completed by November 26, 2008, (order for the same signed in open court). The matter was continued to December 1, 2008 for status on mediation.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Padilla, CSR 975. Clerk: R. Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.

Petition To Deternine Invalidity Fo Purported Trust Provision
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Continued To Sep-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Collier for and with Carol Soto (Trustee). Noel Lawrence for Beverly Sass (Contestant).

Ms. Lawrence stated that they had commenced discovery, that they needed more time and requested a 60 to 90 day continuance. Mr. Collier agreed with the continuance and stated that he did intend to pursue the no contest clause. The matter was continued to September 22, 2008 for status on discovery.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Hill.
